title: Alpha Engine Signals (Slot R contract, v1)
description: Research-slot output contract: written weekly by the research orchestration slot to signals/{date}/signals.json and signals/latest.json; consumed by executor (actionable buckets + sizing inputs), predictor (research-context META_FEATURES), backtester (simulation), dashboard (display). v1 codifies the shape pinned by test_signals_producer_contract.py (research, 2026-06-10) and the consumer-reliance audit of 2026-06-11 (config#638 / M0). Evolution is ADDITIVE-ONLY per the S3 Contract Safety rule: new optional fields may appear at any time (additionalProperties stays true); removing or renaming a required field is a breaking change requiring a v2 schema + dual-write window.

schema_version.description: Contract version stamp (optional in v1 artifacts for backward compatibility; producers should begin emitting it)

market_regime.description: 3-class Ang-Bekaert regime taxonomy (v0.42.0 / 2026-05-28). Legacy 4-class 'caution' retired; historical artifacts carrying 'caution' are grandfathered on READ by tolerant consumers but are NOT valid against this write-contract.

sector_ratings.description: Per-sector {rating: overweight|market_weight|underweight, modifier: float, rationale: string}; executor sizing input

sector_modifiers.description: Per-sector score modifiers (~0.7-1.3); predictor sector_macro_modifier META_FEATURE input

universe.description: Full tracked population with per-ticker signals; executor + predictor + backtester read this

buy_candidates.description: Stocks promoted to buy consideration; executor entry pipeline reads this

signals.description: Legacy v2 per-ticker dict format (deprecated; retained for backward compatibility)

signal.description: Trading signal; executor buckets on this

score.description: Composite attractiveness score (0-100). null tolerated, but producer downgrades ENTER+null to HOLD (2026-04-04 incident guard); predictor drops rows with null score

conviction.description: Score trend; executor derates declining to 0.7x size; predictor research_conviction feature

sector.description: GICS sector name; predictor canonicalizes (Health Care->Healthcare etc.) for sector_modifiers lookup

price_target_upside.description: Estimated upside to price target (decimal, 0.18 = 18%); executor position-target sizing
